headings.style: tracking-tight, high contrast display, elegant scale

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing, overlapping elements, bento grids for galleries, asymmetrical editorial feel.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento for gallery, structural grayscale for hierarchy. Avoid perfect symmetry.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges or minimal roundness (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Deep crimson background with light text, or transparent with dark border. Magnetic hover effect.
components.cards: Cardless design or minimal 1px border (border-[#E5E0D8]). No heavy drop shadows. Use subtle nested padding.
components.badges: Pill-shaped, thin borders, transparent background, classic editorial tag look for credentials.
components.navigation: Sticky, crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F5F2EB]/80) or solid background. MUST display links on desktop, no hamburger on desktop.
components.campaign_gallery: Bento grid protocol: 12-col base, mixing col-span-4, col-span-8, row-span-2. Asymmetric layout with varied tile sizes.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling (lenis). Parallax on floating painting elements to create depth.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Text color shifts, image scale up inside container mask, subtle y-axis lifts.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up and gentle translation for case studies and typography.

media.style: Renaissance fragments, draped silk, statues. Deep contrast. Avoid full-screen 100% dark overlays. Use gradient masks for text visibility.

image_urls.description: Renaissance painting fragment for hero or section transition
Classical marble statue for About section or creative floating element
Red draped silk for Campaign Gallery bento filler or backdrop
Abstract oil painting for case study thumbnail 1 (Luco)
Woman in museum for case study thumbnail 2 (Moxie Beauty)

accessibility.contrast: APCA contrast compliant. Text on images must have subtle gradient masks or text-shadow.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use JavaScript (.js) files for all React components, not .tsx.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter for headings. Use Cormorant Garamond.
The Hero section must be highly typographic and bold, steering clear of standard SaaS templates. Feature the three verticals clearly.
Implement the 'Selected Work' section as a structured narrative layout (Challenge -> Insight -> Strategy -> Result).
Build the 'Campaign Gallery' using a diverse Bento layout with overlapping or varying sizes.
Avoid purple/teal combinations or dark SaaS trends. Adhere strictly to the Renaissance fine-art luxury palette.
No traditional contact form; provide direct email, LinkedIn, and CV download links.
